title: The Last Sunset
author: Maria
story: The sun dipped below the hills one final time. Nobody knew it then, but the sky would never glow quite the same way again.

title: Why the Cat Sat
author: Priya
story: The cat sat on the mat. Not because it was comfortable, but because the mat owed the cat a favor from 1987.

title: Echoes in the Hall
author: James
story: I heard footsteps behind me in the empty school hallway. I turned around. Nothing. I kept walking. The footsteps kept following.

title: The Long Road Home
author: Sofia
story: We left at dawn with nothing but a backpack and a map drawn on a napkin. Three wrong turns, one flat tire, and a thunderstorm later, we finally saw the porch light. Mom was already on the steps, waving like we'd been gone for years instead of hours.

title: The Inventor's Mistake
author: Leo
story: Dr. Patel built a machine that could predict the future — but only five seconds ahead. Useless, everyone said. Until the earthquake hit, and those five seconds saved an entire classroom.

title: Grandma's Recipe
author: Anika
story: My grandma never measured anything. A pinch of this, a handful of that. I tried to write it down once. She laughed and said the secret ingredient was paying attention. I still can't get the soup right.

title: Message in a Bottle
author: Kai
story: I found a bottle on the beach with a note inside. It said: "If you're reading this, look up." I looked up. A kid on the cliff was waving and laughing.

title: The Library at Midnight
author: Zara
story: The books rearranged themselves every night after closing. The librarian knew. She left them snacks.

title: 404: Story Not Found
author: Dev
story: Once upon a time, there was a story here. But someone deleted it. The end. Just kidding — the story backed itself up. It was about a robot who learned to laugh. The robot's name was 404.

title: First Snow
author: Maya
story: The first snowflake landed on her nose. She was seven. She thought it was magic. She was right.
